summary: Iteration 31: Tested 'Meu Perfil' profile page navigation and functionality. Fixed missing category field in save request. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me accepts 'category' field and updates it correctly
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me returns all establishment data including structured_address
Backend: GET /api/categories returns 14 categories with valid Ionicons names
Frontend: Dashboard 'Meu Perfil' button navigates to /establishment/profile (NOT /establishment/offers)
Frontend: Profile page loads with all existing data pre-filled (business_name, CEP, street, neighborhood, city)
Frontend: CEP field shows 'CEP válido' green text when structured_address.cep exists
Frontend: All 14 category chips display with correct Ionicons
Frontend: Currently selected category (Alimentação/food) is highlighted in green
Frontend: 'Salvar Alterações' button saves data and shows success dialog
Frontend: After save, navigates back to /establishment/dashboard
Frontend: Back arrow in header is visible for navigation
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: profile.tsx handleSave() was missing 'category' field in api.updateEstablishment() call - now includes category: form.category
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 complete. Profile page (/establishment/profile) is fully functional. Fixed bug where category field was not being sent in save request. All fields pre-fill correctly from GET /api/establishments/me. CEP validation shows 'CEP válido' when address exists. Category chips display with Ionicons and selected category is highlighted in green. Save navigates back to Dashboard with success confirmation.

features_verified.data_prefill: WORKING - All fields pre-filled from establishment data
features_verified.cep_valid_indicator: WORKING - Shows 'CEP válido' in green when CEP exists
features_verified.category_icons: WORKING - All 14 categories display with correct Ionicons
features_verified.category_selection: WORKING - Selected category highlighted in green
features_verified.save_functionality: WORKING - Saves data and navigates to Dashboard
features_verified.back_navigation: WORKING - Back arrow visible in header

bug_fixed.issue: Category field not being saved when clicking 'Salvar Alterações'
bug_fixed.root_cause: profile.tsx handleSave() was not including 'category: form.category' in the api.updateEstablishment() call
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'category: form.category' to the updateEstablishment payload
